title: More Additional Paintings
description: Adds 15 new vanilla-style Paintings to Minecraft
body:
This Mod adds 15 new vanilla-style Paintings to Minecraft

- Paintings appear randomly in the same way as the vanilla ones.
- The new paintings do **not** replace any existing paintings.

![all paintings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d278f477a2eb975e5c32f2212407c98e69aa8477.jpeg)
feel free to put it in your modpack!
